name: Granola-Buttermilk Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease 12 medium muffin cups with shortening, using about 2 1/2 inches by 1 1/4 inches.
3. In a large bowl, beat together brown sugar and shortening until smooth. Gradually add buttermilk and mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients until the flour is just moistened (the batter will be lumpy).
5. Fill each muffin cup about three-quarters full with batter.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Remove from the pan immediately and serve warm.
Makes 12 muffins.
